title: MACP Policy Descriptor
description: Validates a PolicyDescriptor document in JSON form. See RFC-MACP-0012.

mode.description: Mode identifier this policy applies to, or '*' for mode-agnostic.

schema_version.description: Version of the rule schema used (1 or 2). Version 2 adds the Decision Mode decline-gating parameters; the bump is additive and version 1 policies remain valid.

rules.description: Mode-specific governance rules. In protobuf, this is a JSON string field.

registered_at_unix_ms.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when registered. Set by runtime.
